Interface JavaEngine

All Superinterfaces:
Compilable, ScriptEngine
All Known Implementing Classes:
JavaEngineImpl
@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: JavaEngine.java 878 2021-02-20 19:56:13Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.1.0") public sealed interface JavaEngine extends ScriptEngine, Compilable permits JavaEngineImpl
This is the script engine for the Java programming language.
Author:
Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
Thanks to:
A. Sundararajan
Version:
$Id: JavaEngine.java 878 2021-02-20 19:56:13Z tquadrat $
Since:
0.1.0
UML Diagram
⁠

UML Diagram for "org.tquadrat.foundation.scripting.java.JavaEngine"

⁠

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    CLASSPATH
    The name for the variable that holds the classpath: "classpath".
    static final String
    MAINCLASS
    The name for the variable that holds the name of the main class: "mainClass".
    static final String
    PARENTLOADER
    The name for the variable that holds the class of the parent class loader: "parentLoader".
    static final String
    SOURCEPATH
    The name for the variable that holds the source path (the location for additional source files): "sourcepath".
    static final String
    SYSPROP_PREFIX
    For certain variables, we look for System properties.

    Fields inherited from interface ScriptEngine

    ARGV, ENGINE, ENGINE_VERSION, FILENAME, LANGUAGE, LANGUAGE_VERSION, NAME

  • Method Summary

    Methods inherited from interface Compilable

    compile, compile

    Methods inherited from interface ScriptEngine

    createBindings, eval, eval, eval, eval, eval, eval, get, getBindings, getContext, getFactory, put, setBindings, setContext

  • Field Details

    • CLASSPATH

      static final String CLASSPATH
      The name for the variable that holds the classpath: "classpath".

    • MAINCLASS

      static final String MAINCLASS
      The name for the variable that holds the name of the main class: "mainClass".

    • PARENTLOADER

      static final String PARENTLOADER
      The name for the variable that holds the class of the parent class loader: "parentLoader".
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SOURCEPATH

      static final String SOURCEPATH
      The name for the variable that holds the source path (the location for additional source files): "sourcepath".
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • SYSPROP_PREFIX

      static final String SYSPROP_PREFIX
      For certain variables, we look for System properties. This is the prefix used for such System properties: "com.sun.script.java.".
      See Also:
      • System.getProperties()
      • Constant Field Values
